title: Test a worker using Ecto sandbox allowances for background processes
prompt: Write a test `MyApp.Workers.AsyncFlowTest` that exercises a flow where a supervised GenServer triggers a worker. The test must: (1) `use MyApp.DataCase` (which sets up Ecto sandbox), (2) `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo`, (3) start a `MyApp.AsyncProcessor` (a GenServer) via `start_supervised!/1`, (4) call `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow/3` to grant the processor access to the sandbox connection, (5) trigger the flow with `MyApp.AsyncProcessor.fire/1`, (6) assert the job was enqueued with `assert_enqueued/1`. Write to `test/my_app/workers/async_flow_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: The Ecto sandbox + background process interaction is subtle; requires knowing `Sandbox.allow/3` exists.
